title: Kilimanjaro Lyrics Endhiran song lyrics
stanzas:
Singers: Javed Ali, Chinmayi
Lyrics: P. Vijay

Aahak aahaa .... Aahak aahaa
Napriyaneyaa..Napriyaneyaa..
Napriyaneyaa..Napriyaneyaa..

Kilimanjaro mazhai-kani maanjaro
Kanna kuli maanjaro yaaro yaarao
Aahak aahaa  Aahak aahaa

Mohanjadharo unnil nulainjadhano
paiyan kolinjadharao yaaro yaaro
Aahak aahaa  Aahak aahaa

kaatuvaasi kaatuvasi pachaiyaga kadiya
Muthathaala vegavachi singapallil udaya
Aahak aahaa  Aahak aahaa

Malapaambu pola vandhu maakutaiya pudiya
Sokkum milagu thatti soupu vachi kudiya
Aahak aahaa  Aahak aahaa

Yevazhuku thangachiye enkudathaan irukka
aaluyara olive-pazham appadiye enakka

Akkakko adi kinnikozhi
Appappo enna pinnikodi
Ippappo mutham ennikkodi
Ippap ennikko nee
Kilimanjaro mazhai-kani maanjaro ...

Kodi pachaye elumichaye
unmel unmel uyir ichaye

Ada nooru kodi thasai
Ovvondrilum undhan pere isai

Inichakeere adichakkarai
Manasa renda madichikkera

Naan oora vaitha kani
Ennai mella aara vaithu kadi

Vervarai nuzhayum veyyulum naan
Nee ilaithirai yen ittai ?

Udhattayum udhattayum pootti kondu oru yugam
mudhithu thira anbaai

Akkakko adi kinnikozhi ..
Kilimanjaro mazhai-kani maanjaro ...

Sunai vaasiye suga vaasiye
Thol karuvi enai vaasiye

En thol kuthadha pala rekkai katti
kaal kondadum nila

Mara thegam naan maramkothi nee
Vanadesam naan adhil vaasam nee

Nooru gram thaan idai unakku ini
yaaru naan thaan udai

Ainthadi valarntha aattu sedi- enai
meindhu vidu motham

Pachai pasum pul neeyanaal
puli pul thinnume, enna kutham

Akkakko adi kinnikozhi
Appappo enna pinnikodi
Ippappo mutham ennikkodi
Ippap ennikko nee
Aahak aahaa  Aahak aahaa
Aahak aahaa  Aahak aahaa
Ippapp – ennikko nee

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the theme of the song Kilimanjaro?

The song Kilimanjaro is a vibrant and romantic dance number that showcases the chemistry between the lead characters in Endhiran.

Who composed the music for Kilimanjaro?

The music for Kilimanjaro was composed by the legendary AR Rahman.

What is the context of the song in the movie Endhiran?

In Endhiran, the song Kilimanjaro is set in a picturesque location, highlighting the romantic escapade of the protagonists.

Who are the singers of Kilimanjaro?

The song is sung by Chinmayi and Javed Ali, with additional vocals by Vijay Prakash.

When was the song Kilimanjaro released?

The song was released in the year 2010.
enrichedMetadata.summary: The song Kilimanjaro from the movie Endhiran is a lively and romantic dance number that captures the essence of love and adventure. Set against stunning backdrops, it features the lead characters in a playful and enchanting sequence. The music by AR Rahman, combined with the dynamic vocals of Chinmayi and Javed Ali, creates an unforgettable experience. The song conveys a sense of joy and celebration, making it a favorite for parties and weddings.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Experience the vibrant energy of Kilimanjaro from the epic movie Endhiran. With AR Rahman's electrifying music and the captivating voices of Chinmayi and Javed Ali, this song is a visual and auditory feast. Dive into the world of romance and rhythm that only Endhiran can deliver.
stanzaMeanings: Kilimanjaro, like the rain fruit, who are you?
Mohanjadharo, have you sunk into it? Who are you?
Forest dweller, green and fierce, rising like a lion in Singapore.
Like a snake, you come and catch the crown, tapping the spicy pepper and drinking the soup.
Sister, you are like gold, like an olive fruit to me.
Sister, like a hen, sometimes you are like a thin vine, now give me a kiss.
Kilimanjaro, like the rain fruit, who are you?
Green vine, lemon, my life is on you.
In every cell, your name is music.
Sweet sugarcane, my heart is tied up.
I am the fruit you planted, slowly ripen me.
In the heat that penetrates, why did you leave me?
Closing lips, ending an era with love.
Sister, like a hen, sometimes you are like a thin vine, now give me a kiss. Kilimanjaro, like the rain fruit, who are you?
Spring water, sweet air, embrace me with your shoulders.
Don't pierce my shoulders, the moon dances with wings.
I am the tree, you are the monkey, I am the forest, you live in it.
You are only a hundred grams, who am I to you?
Five feet tall goat plant, graze me completely.
If you are green grass, the tiger will eat it, what's the fault?
Sister, like a hen, sometimes you are like a thin vine, now give me a kiss.
Now, give me a kiss.
